title: More Nonsense Limerick 4
content:
There was an old person of Deal,
    Who in walking used only his heel;
    When they said, "Tell us why?" 
    He made no reply,
    That mysterious old person of Deal.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 4"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
